# NITH Results - NIT Hamirpur Student Results Portal

## Overview
NITH Results (https://nithresults.xyz) is the comprehensive student results portal for National Institute of Technology (NIT) Hamirpur. This platform provides instant access to semester results, SGPA/CGPA calculations, branch-wise performance analytics, and toppers lists.

## Key Features
- **Instant Result Access**: Search and view student results by roll number or name
- **SGPA/CGPA Calculator**: Automated grade point average calculations
- **Branch-wise Analytics**: Performance statistics for all engineering branches
- **Toppers Lists**: View top performers by branch and batch
- **Performance Graphs**: Visual representation of academic performance trends
- **Semester-wise Details**: Complete subject-wise grade breakdown

## Supported Branches
- Architecture (BAR)
- Civil Engineering (BCE)
- Chemical Engineering (BCH)
- Electronics and Communication Engineering (BEC)
- Electrical Engineering (BEE)
- Mathematics and Computing (BMA)
- Mechanical Engineering (BME)
- Material Science (BMS)
- Engineering Physics (BPH)
- Computer Science (BCS)
- Dual Degree Computer Science (DCS)
- Dual Degree Electronics (DEC)

## Technology Stack
- Backend: Flask (Python)
- Database: MongoDB
- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript with responsive design
- Analytics: Google Analytics integration
- Security: CSP headers, rate limiting, HTTPS

## API Documentation
The portal provides RESTful API endpoints:
- `/api/students` - List and filter student results
- `/api/students/<roll_number>` - Get detailed student information
- Supports pagination, sorting, and filtering by branch/batch

## Privacy & Data
- No personal data is collected beyond academic records
- All student information is publicly available academic data
- Rate limiting prevents abuse and ensures fair usage
- CORS-protected API endpoints

## Contact & Support
For inquiries or issues, visit the contact page at https://nithresults.xyz/contact

## Author
Developed and maintained by Nirusaki

## Target Audience
- Current NIT Hamirpur students checking their results
- Alumni reviewing past academic performance
- Parents monitoring student progress
- Recruiters evaluating candidate credentials
- Educational researchers analyzing performance trends
